participants.name: Jay Fair
participants.notes: Fastest 40-yard dash of the day. Trained in Dallas for pro day while completing his degree at USC. Did not attend NFL Combine.

participants.name: Bishop Fitzgerald
participants.notes: NFL Combine invite. Ran 4.55 40 at combine; ran 3-cone at pro day (6.89). All-Big Ten first team in 2025. Transferred from NC State.

participants.name: Eric Gentry
participants.notes: NFL Combine invite. Tallest LB at combine (6'6 5/8"). Combine wingspan was 86 1/4" — SI reported 85" wingspan at pro day. Completed all six events per LA Daily News. Team-best vertical (35.5"). Second-best broad jump (10'4"). Weighed 228 at pro day (up from 221 at combine). Originally from Arizona State.

participants.name: Sam Johnson
participants.notes: Punter. Participated in pro day; specific drill results not reported in available sources.

participants.name: Ja'Kobi Lane
participants.notes: NFL Combine invite. Participated in bench press and receiving drills at pro day. Declared as a junior. Specific bench rep count not reported in available sources.

participants.name: Makai Lemon
participants.notes: NFL Combine invite. Opted out of 40 at combine; ran 4.46 at pro day (official time per USC sources; scouts reported 4.48-4.53 range per Dane Brugler). Biletnikoff Award winner. Projected first-round pick. Measurements from NFL Combine (5'11 1/8", 192, 30 1/2" arms, 8 3/4" hands, 73 1/4" wingspan). Also did positional/route-running drills.

participants.name: Anthony Lucas
participants.notes: NFL Combine invite. Got measured only; did not do any on-field workouts at pro day. Listed at 6'5" 267 lbs per Bleacher Report scouting profile. Transferred from Texas A&M.

participants.name: Lake McRee
participants.notes: NFL Combine invite. Ran 4.73 40 at pro day. Also participated in receiving drills. Known for impressive gauntlet run at NFL Combine.

participants.name: DeCarlos Nicholson
participants.notes: Did not attend NFL Combine. 40 = 4.50, vertical = 34.5", broad jump = 11 feet (132").

participants.name: Hank Pepper
participants.notes: Long snapper. Participated in pro day; specific drill results not reported in available sources.

participants.name: Kamari Ramsey
participants.notes: NFL Combine invite. Participated in pro day drills. Combine results: 4.47 40, 36" vertical, 10'0" broad, 16 bench reps. 6'0", 202 lbs. Specific pro day drill numbers not individually reported in available sources. Transferred from UCLA.

participants.name: J'Onre Reed
participants.notes: Did not attend NFL Combine. Participated in pro day drills. Specific results not reported in available sources.

participants.name: Jaden Richardson
participants.notes: Did not attend NFL Combine. Standout pro day performance. Also participated in receiving drills.

participants.name: Eli Sanders
participants.notes: Got measured only and participated in bench press only. Suffered a knee injury in USC's win over Michigan last season. Did not do any on-field workouts. Specific bench rep count not reported.

participants.name: Keeshawn Silver
participants.notes: Got measured only; did not do any on-field workouts at pro day.

participants.name: DJ Wingfield
participants.notes: Did not attend NFL Combine. Tested in all six events despite not playing the 2025 season after NCAA ruled him out of eligibility following transfer from Purdue. Specific results not reported in available sources.

participants.name: Mason Cobb
participants.notes: Former Trojan from the 2024 roster (18th participant, not among the 17 current-roster prospects). Participated in defensive drills. Specific results not reported in available sources.

additional_notes: USC held its 2026 Pro Day on Thursday, March 12 at Allyson Felix Field / Katherine B. Loker Track Stadium in Los Angeles. Weather was sunny with a heat wave reported. 17 current-roster Trojans plus 1 former Trojan (Mason Cobb from 2024 roster) participated, for 18 total participants. Scouts from all 32 NFL teams attended, including Rams GM Les Snead. QB Sam Huard (current USC player) threw passes to receivers during positional drills. Bears QB Caleb Williams and former WR Marquis Lee were in attendance to support. Seven prospects had prior NFL Combine invites: Fitzgerald, Gentry, Lane, Lemon, Lucas, McRee, and Ramsey. Anthony Lucas, Keeshawn Silver, and Eli Sanders only got measured and did not do on-field workouts (per Ahmad Akkaoui of On3). The LAFB Network published 'official results' with a full table, but the detailed numerical data within that table was not accessible via search results — only narrative-reported numbers from SI, Annenberg Media, LA Daily News/SCNG, and reporter tweets were available. Makai Lemon's 40 time has some discrepancy: USC's official time was reported as 4.46 by SI/Annenberg/LA Daily News, while scouts timed him in the 4.48-4.53 range per The Athletic's Dane Brugler, and the Culver City Observer reported 4.47. The 4.46 is used here as the official pro day time. Timing method (electronic vs. hand-timed) was not specified in any source. Additional individual drill numbers beyond those listed (bench reps, shuttle, cone times for most players) were referenced as existing in a results table but were not individually reported in the text of available articles.
